title: Amethyst update by toavahi
description: This little mod adds a few features based on amethyst. Now both mining and using it will become more interesting and profitable for both single-player fans and large servers enjoyers
body:
Amethyst update mod is bunch of features centered around amethyst. I felt like it had some potential in it, so now you can use this material to create new blocks, useful tools and dangerous weapons.

**I recommend exploring the world and looking for new structure, so you can learn all the new stuff from my mod with it - exploring is fun actully. All crafting recipes can be found experimentally with the info, that new structure will give you.**

**Tools:**
1) Amethyst Chisel is used to relocate budding amethysts (it's strange you can't get them with silk touch, but adding that is boring) if chisel has amethyst shard inside, which you can put in by clicking with a shard on the chisel. And this item also places random block from your hotbar when used not on budding amethysts, so you can create trails and overgrown walls with ease!
2) Amethyst Brush is a literal paint brush. Wet variant cleans colored blocks to base/white variants, color variant paints them. You can change it's color when it's wet by clicking with dye item on brush, water bucket makes it wet, as using it on cauldron. Simple yet fun to paint a giant poster
3) Amethyst Triangle is a music instrument. Crouching and facing height change sound

**Weapons:**
1) Amethyst Shield is just a shield with thorns and more durability
2) Amethyst Grenade is a new projectile, which damages entities and gives them new Amethyst piercing effect, which makes small amethyst parts grow in your body, so you slowly lose your max health. Very useful in PvP

**Materials:**
1) Amethyst Dust is used to create some new stuff and doesn't mix up with food very good, it's kinda sharp
2) AmethCopper ingots are a material for new AmethCopper blocks. They have mixed sounds from copper and amethyst and no functionality

**Entity:**
Amethyst Golem is the only entity (for now), but it's your new friend! A copper golem with some supportive features, still likes pressing buttons.

*I want your suggestions for this mod and future ideas! I am probably going to update this mod, but I don't have any good concepts currently*
